executable.title: Curvature Anisotropic Diffusion Filter
executable.description: Reduces noise while preserving edges using curvature-driven diffusion.
executable.acknowledgements: This command line module used Insight Toolkit (ITK) to implement curvature-driven diffusion image filter.

parameters.label: Filter Parameters
parameters.description: Parameters for the curvature-driven diffusion filter.

double.name: conductance
double.label: Conductance
double.description: Controls the sensitivity to edges. Lower values preserve more detail.>

integer.name: iterations
integer.label: Iterations
integer.description: Number of smoothing iterations to perform.
